name: CreaseEdges
summary: Defines the way naked edges are handled.

enum_values.name: NakedFixed
enum_values.summary: Naked edges will not move or be modified.

enum_values.name: NakedSmooth
enum_values.summary: The naked edge will tend toward a spline.

enum_values.name: CornerFixedOtherCreased
enum_values.summary: Corners (2-sided vertices) will be fixed, while other naked vertices will tend toward a spline.

enum_values.name: Auto
enum_values.summary: Unwelded vertices become creases, and welded are smooth.
